basicDetails.schemeName: Dr. B. R. Ambedkar State Award To SC/ST/OBC/Minorities Students

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The Department for the Welfare of SC/ST/OBC, Government of NCT of Delhi, invites applications for the Dr. B. R. Ambedkar State Award to SC/ST/OBC/Minorities Students, Delhi 2021 from students pursuing graduation in recognized colleges and institutions. The objective of this scholarship is to recognize and reward meritorious students from these communities. Under the scheme, selected toppers in each discipline at the graduation level will receive a cash award of ₹25,000.
schemeContent.benefits_md: - A cash award of ₹25,000 will be provided to students who secure the top position among SC/ST/OBC/Minority students in each discipline of a professional or technical degree course.
schemeContent.briefDescription: Objective of the Scheme to recognise and reward meritorious SC/ST/OBC/Minority students pursuing graduation in recognised institutions.

children.text: The Department for the Welfare of SC/ST/OBC, Government of NCT of Delhi, invites applications for the Dr. B. R. Ambedkar State Award to SC/ST/OBC/Minorities Students, Delhi 2021 from students pursuing graduation in recognized colleges and institutions. The objective of this scholarship is to recognize and reward meritorious students from these communities. Under the scheme, selected toppers in each discipline at the graduation level will receive a cash award of ₹25,000.
A cash award of ₹25,000 will be provided to students who secure the top position among SC/ST/OBC/Minority students in each discipline of a professional or technical degree course.
Login using existing credentials or register as a new user.
Provide all the relevant details and follow the instructions.
Select the scholarship scheme and upload the required documents.

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Application Process**

1. Open the e-district [portal](https://edistrict.delhigovt.nic.in/).1. Login using existing credentials or register as a new user.
1. Provide all the relevant details and follow the instructions.
1. Select the scholarship scheme and upload the required documents.
1. Submit the application.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The student must have passed his/her 10th and 12th class from Delhi. 1. The award is given to a student, who tops among the SC/ST/OBC in each discipline of the professional/Technical degree course. 1. In support thereof must produce SC/ST/OBC caste certificate issued by the competent authority of Delhi. 1. The topper student is awarded only once after passing out of the final examination of the course. 1. The award is conferred among the toppers of all professional/technical courses. Being a merit based award, no family income limit has been laid down.

children.text: The student must have  passed his/her 10th and 12th class from Delhi.
The award is given to a student, who tops among the SC/ST/OBC in each discipline of the professional/Technical degree course.
In support thereof must produce SC/ST/OBC caste certificate issued by the competent authority of Delhi.
The topper student is awarded only once after passing out of the final examination of the course.
The award is conferred among the toppers of all professional/technical courses. Being a merit based award, no family income limit has been laid down.
